policy.owner: Platform security and Next UI maintainers
policy.exit_criteria: Every registered JSX style prop is replaced by a reviewed class, native attribute, bounded DOM adapter, or another representation compatible with style-src-attr 'none'; every runtime style element is removed or receives the exact per-response nonce through a reviewed host boundary.

exceptions.owner: Next storefront and search module maintainers
exceptions.reason: The storefront search package is a hand-styled prototype surface with layout, typography, state and result-card declarations embedded as React style props.
exceptions.constraints: Values are source-authored constants or bounded component state; no server, tenant or user-provided CSS declaration string may be passed to a style prop.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Move the surface to the shared storefront utility-class and component system, including explicit active/error variants.

exceptions.reason: TanStack column pinning projects calculated left, right, width and z-index values onto header and body cells.
exceptions.constraints: The objects come only from the shared getCommonPinningStyles helper and typed table column state; arbitrary CSS strings from row data are forbidden.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Move pinning geometry to a reviewed DOM adapter or stylesheet/custom-property boundary that does not require JSX style props.

exceptions.owner: Next admin chart and design-system maintainers
exceptions.reason: Chart indicators project runtime series colors through style props, and ChartStyle emits a generated style element containing per-chart CSS custom properties.
exceptions.constraints: Chart configuration keys and colors require validation before use; the generated style element currently has no demonstrated per-response nonce path.
exceptions.exit_criteria: Adopt a reviewed finite chart palette or nonce-aware chart style adapter, then remove indicator style props and the unnonced runtime style element.
